creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am requesting for a repocopy of net-p2p/deluge -> net-p2p/deluge05. I have
deluge 1.1.0 ready, but would like to repocopy because the 0.5.x and 1.1.0
are complete different in core as 1.x has been complete rewritten. No
configuration and plugins from 0.5.x will working in 1.x.
